title: NOTICE For Investors In ABT: Lawsuit against Abbott Laboratories announced by Shareholders Foundation
text: San Diego, California--(Newsfile Corp. - November 29, 2022) - The Shareholders Foundation, Inc. announces that a lawsuit is pending for certain investors in shares of Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT).Investors who purchased Abbott Laboratories (NYSE: ABT) shares prior to February 2021 and continue to hold any of their NYSE: ABT shares have also certain options and should contact the Shareholders Foundation at mail@shareholdersfoundation.com or call +1(858) 779 - 1554.
